name: Mail::SMTP::Honeypot
description: Perl module that appears to provide the functionality of a standard SMTP server. Tool: https://metacpan.org/pod/release/MIKER/Mail-SMTP-Honeypot-0.11/Honeypot.pm. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #579 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Mail::SMTP::Honeypot output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Mail::SMTP::Honeypot output file to parse instead of running it live.
